betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Exchangers§f

§aRebuild, upgrade, or re-texture your massive factory halls in the blink of an eye!§f
The §9Exchangers§f mod provides a variety of hand-held tools designed to swap blocks in-world with blocks from your inventory. Instead of manually breaking and replacing blocks — which can disrupt machines and wiring — you can swap entire walls, floors, or columns instantly.

§6Vanilla Tiers (No Power)§f:
§b• Wooden Exchanger§f: §c256 durability§f | §a1×1 range§f.
§b• Stone Exchanger§f: §c384 durability§f | §a3×3 range§f.
§b• Iron Exchanger§f: §c1,024 durability§f | §a7×7 range§f.
§b• Diamond Exchanger§f: §c4,096 durability§f | §a9×9 range§f.
§b• Emerald Exchanger§f: §c8,192 durability§f | §a11×11 range§f.
§b• Obsidian Exchanger§f: §c16,384 durability§f | §a13×13 range§f.
§b• End Exchanger§f: §c32,768 durability§f | §a15×15 range§f.

§6Powered Tech Tiers (Forge Energy)§f:
§b• Thermal Leadstone§f: §e100k FE§f | §a3×3 range§f | §c50 FE/block§f.
§b• Thermal Resonant§f: §e25M FE§f | §a15×15 range§f | §c1,500 FE/block§f.
§b• Mekanism Ultimate§f: §e10M FE§f | §a15×15 range§f | §c1,000 FE/block§f.
§b• Ender IO Vibrant§f: §e25M FE§f | §a15×15 range§f | §c2,500 FE/block§f.
§b• Endergy Stellar§f: §e100M FE§f | §a19×19 range§f | §c5,000 FE/block§f.

§6Special Tool Features§f:
§b• Passive Silk Touch§f: All exchangers in this modpack have §aSilk Touch enabled by default§f. Exchanging grass, glass, ores, or glowstone drops the block itself directly into your inventory.
§b• Enchantments§f: Powered exchangers can be enchanted with §dHolding§f (to increase energy storage capacity) and §dUnbreaking§f (to reduce energy consumption per swap).

§6How to Use Your Exchanger§f:
1. §bSelect a Block to Place§f: Place the replacement block in your inventory. Sneak and scroll, or press the §9Exchanger GUI Keybind§f (default §e.§f) to select it in the tool's interface.
2. §bTarget the Block to Replace§f: Look at the block in the world you want to swap out, and §9Shift-Right-Click§f to lock it as the target type.
3. §bSwap Away§f: §9Right-click§f the surface to instantly swap all matching blocks in the selected area with your replacement blocks.
